focus: [D3-A1/D3] missing hub-level deterministic router: project mode-registry.json into a parseable prompt->workflowMode router for replay

graphEvents.label: How can sk-design parent-to-mode routing be made deterministic and replayable from prompt to workflowMode?
The sk-design parent hub has prose routing rules but no parseable router model; existing router-replay returns parseable:false on the hub
mode-registry.json stores mode identity, packets, aliases and advisorRouting, but not default, weighting, ambiguity or multi-axis selection policy
Nested mode packets such as design-interface already expose DEFAULT_RESOURCE, INTENT_SIGNALS and RESOURCE_MAP for deterministic replay
Existing skill-benchmark router replay and D5 connectivity machinery can enforce a hub router once the hub exposes a parseable registry projection
The parent hub must expose a machine-readable prompt-to-workflowMode router, or routing cannot be replayed independently of prose

label: sk-design hub routing is prose-only and unparseable by the existing deterministic router replay
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE on a fixture corpus; ADVISORY for open-ended live prompts outside fixtures

label: mode-registry.json has mode identity and aliases but lacks default, weighting, ambiguity and multi-axis selection policy
Mode packets already demonstrate the parseable router shape the parent hub lacks
Lane C skill-benchmark can enforce hub routing with a registry-router adapter or local design-hub-router replay script
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for static/router replay; ADVISORY for final design quality

label: Parent-to-mode routing must be represented as a machine-readable prompt-to-workflowMode router before it can be replayed or CI-gated
router-replay.cjs returned parseable:false for .opencode/skills/sk-design on a motion prompt
router-replay.cjs returned parseable:true for design-interface on a redesign prompt

direction: Treat mode-registry aliases alone as deterministic hub routing
reason: Aliases identify plausible mode vocabulary, but the registry lacks default, hint override, ambiguity and multi-axis policy needed to replay a route deterministically.
